question: Design a `Book` class with private members `title`, `author`, and `isbn` (all strings). Provide public methods to set and get these values, ensuring basic encapsulation.

test_cases.input: Create book1 with default constructor, set values. Create book2 with parameterized constructor. Modify book1's title. Create a const book and retrieve values.
test_cases.expected:
Book 1 Details:
Title: The Great Gatsby
Author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
ISBN: 978-0743273565

Book 2 Details:
Title: To Kill a Mockingbird
Author: Harper Lee
ISBN: 978-0061120084

Book 1 (After title revision):
Title: The Great Gatsby (Revised)
Author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
ISBN: 978-0743273565

Const Book Details:
Title: Dune
Author: Frank Herbert
ISBN: 978-0441172719
